name: get_pblocks
short_description: Get a list of Pblocks in the current design
full_help:
get_pblocks

Description: 
Get a list of Pblocks in the current design

Syntax: 
get_pblocks  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>]
             [-include_nested_pblocks] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
list of Pblock objects

Usage: 
  Name                       Description
  --------------------------------------
  [-regexp]                  Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]                  Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only 
                             when -regexp specified)
  [-filter]                  Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]              Get Pblocks of these cells
  [-include_nested_pblocks]  Display the the list of nested pblocks
  [-quiet]                   Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                 Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]               Match Pblock names against patterns
                             Default: *

Categories: 
Object, Floorplan, XDC

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp specified)
Display the the list of nested pblocks
Suspend message limits during command execution
